segments.text: Showing that it's not that simple
segments.original_text: やすい京ではないということを
これで証明してくれている

segments.text: Came out with nair, but got caught in the up air juggle
segments.original_text: 空Nでたが空上着地狩りの展開

segments.text: Got some nice mashing out though
segments.original_text: うまく暴れを通していったが

full_text: Showing that it's not that simple proving it right here Came out with nair, but got caught in the up air juggle Got some nice mashing out though quite a bit

corrections.original: 空中でたが空中へ着地狩り
corrections.corrected: 空Nでたが空上着地狩り
corrections.rule: abbreviation: 空中→空N, 空中へ→空上
